entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The primary legume crop studied for variability in Ugandan landraces

entities.name: UGANDA
entities.description: The country where pigeonpea cropping systems and landraces were evaluated

entities.name: AGRO-MORPHOLOGICAL CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The process of evaluating the physical and growth characteristics of pigeonpea landraces

entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: A crop predominantly intercropped with pigeonpea in Uganda

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A crop intercropped with pigeonpea in Uganda

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A crop intercropped with pigeonpea in Uganda

entities.name: INSECT PESTS
entities.description: Organisms that cause damage to pigeonpea crops

entities.name: APACH
entities.description: A district in Uganda where pest control was practiced

entities.name: LIRA
entities.description: A district in Uganda where pest control was practiced

entities.name: FUSARIUM WILT DISEASE
entities.description: A fungal disease observed at low levels in the studied pigeonpea collections

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: The country where agronomic evaluation of pigeonpea accessions took place

entities.name: KABETE
entities.description: A cooler test location in Kenya used for agronomic evaluation

entities.name: KAMPI YA MAWE
entities.description: A warmer test location in Kenya used for agronomic evaluation

entities.name: 100-SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: An agronomic measure of seed size and weight

entities.name: VEGETATIVE GROWTH
entities.description: The growth of the plant's vegetative parts, which can affect seed weight

entities.name: CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to group pigeonpea germplasm based on similarities

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: The genetic material of the Ugandan pigeonpea landraces

entities.name: DIVERSITY
entities.description: The degree of genetic and morphological variation within the pigeonpea accessions

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The time taken for the crop to reach maturity, categorized as short, medium, or late

entities.name: PUBESCENT PODS
entities.description: The presence of hairs on the pods, associated with insect resistance

entities.name: INSECT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to resist damage from insect pests
